notes: M20.UC2 quality gates. Pure offline. Cross-check is PRICE+DATE only; Alpaca IEX vs Yahoo volume is NOT comparable (single-venue vs consolidated) so volume divergence is never a failure. Liquidity gates use the consolidated source (yahoo). max_scan_ready_per_run is a configurable safety ceiling; UC2 supports report-only mode (no write-back) for pre-review.
